settings.editorial: Rubies and gold vermeil. An heirloom piece, unusual and delicate.

settings.title: Product Name
settings.editorial: Modernism in motion. Statement earrings that lift every outfit.

settings.title: Product Name
settings.editorial: Cobalt, the colour Atelier Modernista was founded on.  Bold, elegant and full of presence, these earrings get discreetly noticed for all the right reasons.

settings.hero_headline_italic: it has a point of view.
settings.hero_body: Art-inspired pieces from independent designers — chosen because they do something we think is special. Bold colour, real presence, and nothing produced at scale.
settings.philosophy_body: Most jewellery is designed to match most things. It sits quietly, coordinates politely, then disappears. Atelier Modernista was born from an opposite impulse - a love of jewellery that has genuine presence.
settings.philosophy_quote: Make the things we own more beautiful.
settings.byl_body: Each look is a considered combination — chosen because the pieces do something together they can't do apart.
